prestazioni: Replace the stock **455ci (7.5L) Nailhead-derived big-block (engine code: L77)** with a **BluePrint Engines 455 Stroker Crate (BP4551CTC)**, featuring forged internals (Scat 4340 crank, Eagle H-beam rods, Mahle forged pistons), CNC-ported **Edelbrock Performer RPM cylinder heads (PN 60899)**, and a **Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H hydraulic roller camshaft (PN 32-602-8)** with .544/.548 lift and 242/248 duration for optimized torque and mid-range power.

Install a **Holley Sniper EFI 2x4 (PN 550-511K)** with dual-sync distributor and **MSD 6AL-2 ignition box (PN 6420)** for precise fuel mapping and spark control, paired with **FAST 45 lb/hr injectors (PN 16-1545)** and a **K&N 14x3.5x1.5-inch conical air filter (PN 63-1561)** for improved throttle response and air flow.

Upgrade the drivetrain with a **Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission (PN TKO-600-1B)** mated to a **McLeod twin-disc clutch (PN 691002)** and **Hurst Competition/Plus shifter (PN 3916010)**, alongside a **Currie 9-inch rear end (PN 9-40-3100)** with 3.73:1 gears, **Moser 31-spline axles (PN 9310-A)**, and a **Detroit Truetrac limited-slip differential (PN 912A631)** for improved traction and durability.
estetica: Apply a **PPG Hot Rod Black (HRC9900) paint scheme** with **House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red (KAR-10)** scallops and **3M Scotchcal Matte Black (1080-M226) pinstriping** for a period-correct yet aggressive look, paired with **Ringbrothers billet aluminum side mirrors (PN RB-MIRROR-GSX)** and **Dynacorn 1970 GSX reproduction fiberglass hood (PN 70-197001)** with functional scoop.

Install **Billet Specialties Tru Trac billet grille (PN 700-20010)** and **Lokar Retro Bright LED taillights (PN TLL-7001)** with sequential turn signals, alongside **Wheel Vintiques 15x8 and 15x10 steel wheels (PN 7005-158, 7005-1510)** wrapped in **BFGoodrich Radial T/A tires (235/60R15 front, 275/60R15 rear)** for authentic muscle car stance.

Enhance the interior with **Recaro SRD bucket seats (PN 391.01.000)** upholstered in **Distinctive Industries black vinyl with red Houndstooth inserts (PN DI-70-1970GSX-INT)**, a **Grant GT wood-rim steering wheel (PN 3501)**, and **AutoMeter Ultra-Lite gauges (PN 4382 for tach, PN 4327 for oil pressure)** in a **Billet Specialties billet aluminum dash panel (PN 700-20020)** for a modernized yet retro cockpit.
